def positive_repeated_datetime_strptime_same_format():
    rule_id = "repeated_datetime_strptime_same_format"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "datetime.strptime(...) is repeated with the same format string instead of reusing a parsed shape or preprocessing once."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
